content: Sorry It's probably gonna take us 1 or 2 more days to go through all of this, but THANK YOU SO MUCH for the feedback!
Before anything else, I want to reassure you
1) "Did the devs reject the term change suggestion I submitted?"
It's more likely they translated the story BEFORE you submitted the term change suggestion... Since we sent out the term base & story for translation before the volunteer project started;

Ideally if we could all use an online TMS like Phrase or Crowdin the discrepancies between the online term base volunteers are using V.S. the local term base that translation agency is using could've been avoided

I probably shouldn't be saying this, but honestly I wish we had the money right now so we can all work as full time translators together, get to use the online TMS tools that automatically syncs progress, I wish I had the time to discuss the details with everyone as a team. Like that's how I used to work at my previous job. But we can't yet and I feel sorry...
That being said, I'll still do my best to get the game's translation better with what we have right now

The current version of translation in-game won't be the last version!! I convinced team to let me put the first 5 chapters out first so we can test the waters and gather opinions from volunteers & other players.

As a translator I would've also preferred to only release a translated version when it's 100% done and super polished; but I understand why Light would rather have a generally okay version out there first and fix it later. This way the game gets to reach more players sooner. A version done by professionals that seems acceptable to the average players but still isn't the best is still better than mtl;

We just received the entire retranslated Arc 1 story from the agency;
I plan to test, review, and edit the text with our other fulltimer in the following weeks before we release them for the anniversary, and we'll be referencing issues raised in this thread while we're at it
🙁 We paid for human translation. Contacted the best agencies we could find, the ones that worked on Genshin, HSR and LADs, and we selected the one that did best in trials...
To say I didn't expect them to use AI at all would be a lie because I've also heard of what a lot of people do in this industry + we are indeed working on a very tight deadline
We'll be paying close attention during the reviewing phase!

Totally understandable tbh, unfortunately it is kind of just the reality nowadays...<:scared1:1356053141816213507>
We can always help polish/edit anything that might have slipped through the cracks afterwards!
